scripts.push: bash -lc 'set -a && source ../../artifacts/api-server/.env && set +a && prisma db push'
scripts.migrate: bash -lc 'set -a && source ../../artifacts/api-server/.env && set +a && prisma migrate deploy'
scripts.migrate:dev: bash -lc 'set -a && source ../../artifacts/api-server/.env && set +a && prisma migrate dev'
